rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ROBERT I. MOE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petitioner'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Non-Party'S Compliance With Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Business Records
rulings.Rulings: The motion to compel is denied with respect to tax returns. The motion is denied with respect to requests where the responding party has already agreed or offered to produce documents (but on condition that those documents in fact be produced) and with respect to requests where the responding party has stated that there are no responsive documents or that all responsive documents have already been produced. With respect to all other requests, the responding party and the bank must produce those documents that mention or refer in any way to Robert Moe but need not produce documents that do not mention or refer to Mr. Moe. The Court will not award sanctions. Any party who wishes to argue the motion and/or tentative ruling must notify opposing counsel and the Courtroom Clerk (415-551-3702) by 5:00 p.m. on Wednesday, June 27, 2012.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CHRISTOPHER KYLE COATS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondent Valley Forge Mountain Partners, Inc F/K/A The Kean Org., Inc. Notice Of Demurrer To Petition To Admin. With Will Annexed Of Est. Of C. Coatsto Establish Est, Claim Of Ownership To Property,Ect.
rulings.Rulings: Demurrer sustained without leave to amend as to allegations of elder abuse regarding Francesca Coats on the grounds of lack of standing. Demurrer sustained with leave to amend as to late discovery and fraud. Amended Petition shall be filed within 30 days. Any party who wishes to contest the tentative must contact opposing counsel and the court (415-551-3702) no later than 5:00 p.m. on 6/27/12 to request argument.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ROSA R. HUBER 1995 TRUST AGREEMENT, DATED JANUARY TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer Of Respondent F. J. Sarria To Petitioner R. Wambach'S Petition To Remove Trustee.
rulings.Rulings: The demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. The Petitioner lacks standing to bring a 17200 petition given that the settlor of the trust retains the right to revoke or modify or exercise any other power with respect to the trust. See Probate Code section 15800(a). Any party who wishes to argue the matter and/or tentative ruling must notify opposing counsel and the Courtroom Clerk (415-551-3702) by 5:00 p.m. on Wednesday, June 27, 2012.
